meta.title: The State of Iraq—and the Republic of Kurdistan?—After ISIS
meta.description: Bayan Sami Abdul Rahman, Michael Pregent, Eric Brown, Kenneth Pollack, and Ranj Alaaldin discuss Iraq, Kurdistan, and the new U.S. administration. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
